name: vw_batter_stats
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_batter_stats AS SELECT player_name, total_runs, strike_rate, team, matches_played_as_batter, total_wickets_taken FROM batter_player_stats;

name: vw_bowler_stats
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_bowler_stats AS SELECT player_name, total_wickets_taken, economy_rate, team, matches_played_as_bowler, total_runs FROM bowler_player_stats;

name: vw_detailed_player_data
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_detailed_player_data AS SELECT match_id, player, team, runs, balls_faced, fours, sixes, wickets, overs_bowled, balls_bowled, runs_conceded, catches, run_outs, maiden, stumps, match_outcome, opposition_team, strike_rate, economy, fantasy_points, venue FROM detailed_player_data;

name: vw_match_summary
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_match_summary AS SELECT match_id, dates, venue, city, gender, match_type, total_wickets_taken, total_runs, total_fours, total_sixes FROM match_summary;
